title: Nigeria Establishes Virtual Asset Council to Regulate Crypto
summary: Nigeria's president has signed an executive order creating a virtual asset council to oversee crypto regulation. The move aims to unify fragmented crypto policies and establish clear tax guidelines for digital assets.
body:
Nigeria's president has signed an executive order establishing a virtual asset council to streamline crypto regulation in the country. The order addresses the fragmented approach to crypto oversight and enforcement, aiming to create a unified regulatory framework.

The new council will oversee the implementation of regulations and tax policies for virtual assets. This includes defining clear guidelines for crypto taxation, which has been a significant concern for investors and businesses in the space. The order also emphasizes the need for collaboration between various government agencies to ensure effective enforcement.

This development is crucial for everyday Nigerians interested in crypto, as it provides a clearer legal framework for investing and using digital assets. With unified regulations, users can expect more transparency and security in their crypto transactions. The establishment of the council also signals Nigeria's commitment to integrating crypto into its financial system.

For those involved in crypto, this is a significant step toward legitimacy and protection. The next steps will involve the council's formation and the rollout of specific regulations and tax guidelines. Users should watch for announcements from the council and be prepared to comply with new tax requirements. Read more → https://cointelegraph.com/news/nigeria-order-crypto-regulatory-framework?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
twitterThread: Nigeria just created a virtual asset council to regulate crypto. Clear tax guidelines are coming soon. 🇳🇬
The new council will unify fragmented crypto policies and enforce regulations. Expect more transparency and security in transactions.

If you're in Nigeria, watch for updates from the council. New tax rules are coming — be prepared. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-20-nigeria-establishes-virtual-asset-council-to-regulate-crypto
standaloneTweet: Nigeria is taking a big step toward crypto regulation with a new virtual asset council. Clear tax guidelines are on the way, making it safer for everyday users. 🇳🇬
